mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_IDX, BOARD_GRP_IDX, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATE_USER, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_DATE FROM BOARD
AND TYPE = #{type}
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY BOARD_IDX DESC
SELECT BOARD_IDX, BOARD_GRP_IDX, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATE_USER, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_DATE FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_IDX = #{boardIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_GRP_IDX, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, CREATE_USER, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{boardGrpIdx}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createUser}, NOW() )
